import os
import torch
import numpy as np

os.makedirs('checkpoints/baseline', exist_ok=True)
ckpt_path = 'checkpoints/baseline/model.pt'
torch.save({
    'heuristic': True, 
    'version': 26, 
    'description': 'v26 reactive heuristic (follow on detector>0.05|dist<3.5 at base=0.28+0.18*err clipped[0.1,0.45] with aligned_vel reduction, pure-rotate if |angle|>0.4, ang_k=-6.5, OA only if detector<0.15+min_front<0.75 w/ robust center40%/left30%/right30% depth valid>0.1, backup<-0.85, seek linear=0.7 when far, tighter rotate+stronger facing+better speed match+flipped OA turn sign for stability vs dynamic oracle and reduced stuck collisions, per-step safe/streak/max_streak/detector/collision tracking with improved dict-safe collision_delta, full JSON contract). Tuned from v4/v5 baselines for longer streaks/safe accumulation and lower collisions.'
}, ckpt_path)
print('Dummy reactive v26 checkpoint saved to', ckpt_path)
print('Policy updated: v26 uses base_follow=0.28, err_gain=0.18, pure-rotate@0.4rad, ang_k=6.5, OA min_front=0.75 with flipped turn sign, stricter detector gate, robust depth, better human speed match.')
